title: Vary Me
description: Block variants to break up tiling patterns
body:
**Summary**\
Adds block variants for many blocks. In most instances you shouldn't see a change unless you are looking for it. Additionally some entities have subtle variants for some of the mods using optifine (or equivalent).

Features some support for [respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts)
**********************

**Additional pack recommendation**\
[Spring Flowers](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/spring-flowers-5010421/)\
[More Fungi](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/more-fungi/)\
[Ore Variants](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/ore-variants)\
[Fresh Animations (see patch in additional files)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vary-me/version/b1.4.0)

**Credits**\
Axolotl Buckets - Blazified\
https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/colored-axolotl-buckets-with-babies/ \
Grass, Cobblestone, Mycelium, End Stone, Birch Logs, Red Mushroom\
https://vanillatweaks.net/ \
Frost - Pigeo (in older version of pack)\
https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/frost-5440407/ \
Painting Item Variants\
https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/painting-item-variants-1-19-4-16x-optifine/ 

 
**********************
SEE BELOW FOR CREDITS PERMISSIONS!!

[Credits terms of use](https://imgur.com/a/vary-me-credits-terms-usage-PPloZQA)

**********************
I am only supporting later versions.
Most features should support down to 1.16 ignore the error

If you wish to use this in your own pack please use proper credit.
